tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(do
  (def incidents (pagerduty__list_incidents {:status "triggered" :urgency "high"}))
  (if (empty? incidents)
    (do
      (slack__post_message {:channel "incidents" :text "All clear."})
      {:action "slack" :count 0})
    (let [ids (map :id incidents)
          body (str "High urgency triggered incidents: " (join ", " ids))]
      (email__send_email {:to "onc…(+112)
